name: block-kit
context: Block Kit: Slack's UI framework for rich, interactive messages with blocks, elements, and composition objects
info: Block Kit is Slack's component-based UI framework for building rich, interactive message layouts. Messages are composed from stackable blocks (section, actions, input, header, divider, context, image), each containing elements (buttons, menus, date pickers, text inputs) and composition objects (text, confirm dialogs, option groups). Block Kit powers interactive messages in [[slack/messages]], bot responses in [[slack/bots]], webhook payloads in [[slack/webhooks]], and modal views. Use the Block Kit Builder at https://app.slack.com/block-kit-builder to visually design and preview layouts.

sections.title: Block types
sections.body: Blocks are the top-level containers: `section` (text + optional accessory), `header` (large bold text), `divider` (horizontal rule), `actions` (interactive element row), `context` (small metadata), `input` (form fields in modals), `image` (full-width), `rich_text` (formatted content). A message can contain up to 50 blocks.

sections.title: Interactive elements
sections.body: Elements live inside blocks: `button`, `static_select`, `external_select`, `multi_static_select`, `datepicker`, `timepicker`, `plain_text_input`, `checkboxes`, `radio_buttons`, `overflow`. Each interactive element needs an `action_id`. Handle interactions in [[slack/bots#interactions]].

sections.title: Composition objects
sections.body: Reusable structures: text objects (`mrkdwn` or `plain_text`), confirm dialogs (attach to any interactive element), option objects (for selects and checkboxes), option groups (categorized options), and filter objects (for conversation selects). Text objects are used everywhere — see [[slack/messages#formatting]] for mrkdwn syntax.

sections.title: Actions block
sections.body: The `actions` block holds up to 25 interactive elements in a row — buttons, selects, date pickers. Each element has an `action_id` that maps to a handler in [[slack/bots#interactions]]. Use `style: "primary"` (green) or `style: "danger"` (red) on buttons for visual emphasis.

sections.title: Modal views
sections.body: Modals are popup forms opened with `views.open` using a `trigger_id` from a command or interaction. Use `input` blocks with form elements. Handle submission with `app.view(callback_id, handler)` in [[slack/bots#interactions]]. Access form values at `view.state.values[block_id][action_id].value`. Modals support stacking up to 3 views deep with `views.push`.

sections.title: Block Kit Builder tool
sections.body: Visual drag-and-drop builder at https://app.slack.com/block-kit-builder. Design layouts, preview rendering, copy JSON output. Paste the JSON into the `blocks` field of [[slack/messages]], [[slack/webhooks]], or [[slack/bots]] payloads. Supports all block types and elements with live preview.
